title: cli/dm: DM payload not MLS-encrypted even when mls_active — relay sees plaintext
description: The /dm command in cli/src/commands.rs (around line 2218) always wraps the message as a plaintext ClearMessage::Chat in the Whisper payload, regardless of whether mls_active is true. The normal broadcast path seals the message with HPKE (line 2793) so the relay sees only ciphertext. /dm bypasses this — when MLS is active, the whisper payload is readable by the relay. The comment on line 2216 says 'Phase 1 (pre-MLS)' but the code path is reached even post-MLS. Fix: when mls_active, encrypt the payload via mls.encrypt() + pad() before placing it in the Whisper, matching the main send path.
